title: SENENQU 50 Sets 8 Inch Foil Trays with Lids, 1000ml Disposable Tin Foil Food Containers, Round Aluminum Foil Flan Dishes Pie Cases for Baking Roasting Food Storage Takeaway | Freezer & Oven Safe
features: 【LARGE CAPACITY】Each package includes 50 pack 8" foil dishes with plastic lids, and the size of each round food container is 205 x 40mm / 8 x 1.6 inch. The large capacity of 1000ml is perfect for storing food to keep fresh, meeting your different needs in daily life.

【PERFECT HEAT CONDUCTIVITY】Made of high quality aluminum foil, our foil food trays are non-toxic, sturdy and durable with high temperature resistance from -25-250℃, which can help food heat evenly, perfect for oven, refrigerator, open flame, etc. to cook and store delicious food.

【CLEAR SEALING LIDS】With the plastic covers included, our aluminum baking dishes can effectively protect food from spilling out and keep them from dust, convenient for transportation and takeout. Also, the transparent lid design allows you see clearly what the food is inside without opening the lid, saving your time during use.

【RECYCLABLE FOIL TRAYS】With our disposable tinfoil food containers, no need to worry about the plates being broken or spending time washing dishes, and you can just throw them away after parties. Made of recyclable aluminum foil, the food trays will do no harm to the environment.

【PRACTICAL ALUMINUM TRAYS】Our reusable foil food trays are suitable for roasting, broiling, baking, freezing, cooking, heating leftovers and more. You can use the foil dishes to keep food fresh and cook delicious pies, tarts, cakes, casseroles, etc., ideal for party, school, office, picnic, hiking, takeaway, travel, barbecue and so on.
description: Product Description SPECIFICATION Material Aluminum foil Size 205 x 175 x 40mm / 8 x 6.9 x 1.6 inch (Top Dia. x Bottom Dia. x H) Thickness 0.07mm Capacity 1000ml Heat Resistance -25 – 250℃ Package Includes 50 x Foil Food Container 50 x Clear Plastic Cover
